message:
feat(abi-tests): expand poll_abi test coverage from 19 to 56 tests

Add tests for previously untested symbols (pselect, epoll_pwait, prctl)
and edge cases for existing ones (epoll_ctl MOD/DEL, edge-triggered,
eventfd flags/semaphore, timerfd disarm/nonblock, multiple fd polling).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
